other asterism, the Banner should be raised and erected, after hon-
ouring the Brahmanas with jaggery, sweet-meats, milk porridge and
such other dishes as well as with Daksinas (gifts of money).
[We are told that the Standard of Indra should be brought
inside (he city on the 8th lunar day and its final erection done on
the 12th Tithi. So it is a festival lasting for five days. It would be
better if the 5th day had (he star Sravana; but the former is more
important than the asterism. This reminds us of the rule :
